change: Raised GGUF GDN prefill recurrent-segments threshold default from 256 to 1025 so the exact single-segment k2 recurrent kernel handles 512/1024/768-row primary and 128K low-memory chunks by default; segments_k2 remains available via HIPENGINE_GGUF_GDN_PREFILL_SEGMENT_THRESHOLD.

checks.hot_path_torch_or_llamacpp_import_grep: No matches for import torch or llama.cpp in hipengine/runtime/qwen35_gguf_runner.py
